DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test1; CREATE TABLE test1(a UInt32, b Float64, c Float64, d Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSampMatrix(b, c, d) FROM test1;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test2; CREATE TABLE test2(x UInt8, y Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSampMatrix(y) FROM (SELECT y FROM test3 WHERE x > 3);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS complex_test; CREATE TABLE complex_test(a UInt32, b Float64, c Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayJoin(covarSampMatrix((SELECT b FROM complex_test), (SELECT c FROM complex_test))) AS covariance FROM complex_test;
WITH (SELECT AVG(b) FROM test1) AS avg_b, (SELECT AVG(c) FROM test1) AS avg_c SELECT covarSampMatrix(avg_b, avg_c);
CREATE TABLE test4(a Int32, b Float64, c Float64, d Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSampMatrix(b, c, d) FROM test4 WHERE a = 1;
INSERT INTO test1(a, b, c, d) VALUES (6, -10, 10, -10);
SELECT round(covarSampMatrix(b, c, d), 2) FROM test1;
